Q1 FY27 Broker Estimates — Averages

Consensus for Apr–Jun 2026 (reported Jul–Aug) · average of MOSL / Kotak / Ambit / Spark / I-Sec · 494 companies. All figures in ₹ crore (EBITDA margin in %).
Est = broker average (hover for the low–high range). Actual is auto-filled from Screener once a company reports (89 so far, shown in green); for the rest, type the number in and the beat / miss shows instantly. Your entries save in your browser and are auto-replaced by the official Screener figure the moment it’s published.
Your watchlist is empty. Click the ☆ star on any company’s card to add it — it’s saved in your browser and shared with the calendar.

Est: avg of 2 brokers · range on hover · Q1 FY27E · type an Actual → surprise auto-calcs
Est = average of MOSL / Kotak / Ambit / Spark / I-Sec for Q1 FY27E (Revenue/NII, EBITDA/PPOP, PAT). Actual is the reported figure auto-filled from Screener (green) or typed by you; surprise = (actual − est) ÷ est, margin surprise in percentage points. For banks/NBFCs, EBITDA is not meaningful and is left blank. Numbers in ₹ crore. Updated 24 Jul 2026, 05:03 AM IST.
